title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 43
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost phone charger.
questions.audio_script: Girl: Did you find your phone charger? You sounded worried this morning. || Boy: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the kitchen, because I remembered charging my phone there. || Girl: And did you check the bedroom? You were there later. || Boy: I did, but it was not there. Then my grandma called and said [1]my phone charger was plugged in beside the sofa[/1]. I must have left it there without thinking. || Girl: Good. You would need it today. || Boy: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Did you find your phone charger? You sounded worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the kitchen, because I remembered charging my phone there.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: And did you check the bedroom? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I did, but it was not there. Then my grandma called and said my phone charger was plugged in beside the sofa. I must have left it there without thinking.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Good. You would need it today.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

questions.question: Where is the phone charger?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, phone charger on a kitchen table, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, phone charger on a bedroom desk, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, phone charger plugged in beside a sofa, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says my phone charger was plugged in beside the sofa.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
questions.audio_script: Boy: Are we still going to walk in the park this afternoon? I was looking forward to it. || Girl: I don't think so. Heavy rain is expected, so that plan will not work. || Boy: We could go shopping instead. || Girl: I checked, but we bought clothes yesterday. My cousin suggested another idea, and [1]we are visiting the aquarium after school[/1]. || Boy: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet? || Girl: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together. || Girl: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Are we still going to walk in the park this afternoon? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I don't think so. Heavy rain is expected, so that plan will not work.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: We could go shopping instead.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I checked, but we bought clothes yesterday. My cousin suggested another idea, and we are visiting the aquarium after school.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, friends walking in a park, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about the history walk.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What do we need to take for the history walk tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much. || Girl: The teacher said we do not need to bring a packed lunch, because they have enough for everybody. || Woman: What about a football? || Girl: No, not this time. The important thing is this: [1]bring a raincoat because showers are possible near the castle[/1]. || Woman: Thanks. I will put it in my bag tonight. || Girl: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What do we need to take for the history walk tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: The teacher said we do not need to bring a packed lunch, because they have enough for everybody.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about a football?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: No, not this time. The important thing is this: bring a raincoat because showers are possible near the castle.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Thanks. I will put it in my bag tonight.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food in a café.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you decided what to get for lunch? The queue is moving quickly. || Boy: I first thought about fruit salad, but I want something hot. || Man: The pizza slice looks good too. || Boy: Maybe, but there is too much cheese. I think [1]I will have the tomato soup because it will warm me up[/1]. || Man: Good choice. I will order after you. || Boy: Great, then we can find a table near the window before it gets busy. || Boy: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear a school announcement about the school choir.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: This is a message for students joining the school choir today. Please do not go to the music room, because the piano is being tuned. Some students may wait by the main hall, but there is a parents' meeting. The teacher has changed the room for today only. [1]Everyone should go straight to the drama studio after lunch[/1]. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: This is a message for students joining the school choir today. Please do not go to the music room, because the piano is being tuned. Some students may wait by the main hall, but there is a parents' meeting. The teacher has changed the room for today only. Everyone should go straight to the drama studio after lunch. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the airport.
questions.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the airport tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the coach. || Man: I was, but the first coach is full. || Woman: Could you use the train instead? || Man: I checked, but there are repairs on the line. [1]I am going to take the car because my uncle is driving there anyway[/1]. || Woman: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Man: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Man: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about work in a sports centre.
questions.audio_script: Man: What are you doing at the sports centre this afternoon? I thought the manager asked you to check tickets. || Woman: Not now, because the machine does that now. || Man: So will you clean the pool area? || Woman: No, it is closed until evening. The manager said [1]my job today is to give out towels at reception[/1]. || Man: That sounds clear enough. || Woman: Yes, and it should not take too long if the shop stays quiet. I can help you afterwards. || Woman: That should make the rest of the day much easier.
